metadata.title: Onye Emepụta Mbinye Aka Email n'efu – HTML maka Gmail & Outlook
metadata.description: Mepụta mbinye aka email HTML ọkachamara na-enweghị ide koodu. Tinye nkọwa kpọtụrụ, logo, njikọ mmekọrịta, wee detuo gaa Gmail ma ọ bụ Outlook.

hero.title: Mepụta mbinye aka email HTML ọkachamara
hero.description: Wuo mbinye aka email ọkachamara na nkeji. Tinye nkọwa gị, họrọ agba, wee detuo koodu HTML dị njikere gaa Gmail, Outlook, ma ọ bụ onye ahịa email ọ bụla.

software.name: Onye emepụta mbinye aka email n'efu
alternateName: Onye emepụta mbinye aka email HTML
software.description: Onye emepụta mbinye aka email HTML n'efu. Tinye nkọwa kpọtụrụ, njikọ CTA, na profaịlụ mmekọrịta, mgbe ahụ detuo koodu dị njikere gaa Gmail, Outlook, na ndị ahịa email ndị ọzọ.
featureList: Nkọwa kpọtụrụ (aha, aha ọrụ, ụlọ ọrụ)
Logo ma ọ bụ onyonyo profaịlụ nwere nhọrọ ụdị na nha
Akara mmekọrịta (ikpo okwu 12: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X, GitHub, Dribbble, Behance, WhatsApp, Telegram, Pinterest)
Agba a nwere ike ịdozi (ederede, mmetụta, ndabere)
Ụdị ederede ọ bụla maka akụkụ mbinye aka ọ bụla
Bọtịnụ CTA nwere ederede na njikọ nhọrọ
Nlele mbinye aka na-adị ndụ nwere ịgbanwe ndabere (ìhè, ojii, agba agba)
Nlele koodu isi mmalite HTML na modal
Chekwaa mbinye aka dịka faịlụ HTML
Bupụ wee webata ntọala dịka faịlụ JSON
Ndakọrịta na Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail
Ngwa ọrụ n'efu, enweghị nbanye achọrọ

howTo.name: Otu esi eji onye emepụta mbinye aka email
howTo.description: Otu esi emepụta mbinye aka email HTML ọkachamara site na iji onye emepụta Arteon n'efu.

steps.name: Họrọ nhazi mbinye aka
steps.text: Họrọ otu n'ime nhazi asatọ dị: Standard, Top bar, Labels left, Centered, Compact, Two columns, Minimalist, ma ọ bụ Bottom bar.

steps.name: Kpuchie nkọwa kpọtụrụ
steps.text: Na taabu Details, tinye aha gị, aha ọrụ, ụlọ ọrụ, email, ekwentị, na URL weebụsaịtị. N'nhọrọ, tinye avatar ma ọ bụ logo — mgbe itinyechara URL onyonyo, nhọrọ ọzọ ga-apụta: Ụdị avatar (okirikiri, ntụpọ, ma ọ bụ onígun) na Nha avatar (40, 56, ma ọ bụ 72 px).

steps.name: Tinye bọtịnụ CTA
steps.text: Na taabu Buttons, tinye ederede na URL maka bọtịnụ mbụ. N'nhọrọ, tinye bọtịnụ nke abụọ n'ụdị outline wee họrọ ntụpọ bọtịnụ.

steps.name: Tinye njikọ mmekọrịta
steps.text: Na taabu Social Media, mado URL gaa profaịlụ gị. Ikpo okwu a na-akwado: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X, GitHub, Dribbble, Behance, WhatsApp, Telegram, na Pinterest.

steps.name: Dozie ọdịdị
steps.text: Na taabu Appearance, họrọ isiokwu agba, font, na nha ederede. Na taabu Text Style, gbanwee agba na nha akụkụ ọ bụla.

steps.name: Tinye ozi iwu wee dozie ahịrị nkewa
steps.text: Na taabu Disclaimer / Legal, tinye ederede iwu wee dozie ahịrị nkewa — họrọ ụdị (solid, dashed, dotted), obosara (1–3 px), na agba.

steps.name: Lee nlele wee detuo mbinye aka
steps.text: Nlele mbinye aka dị na ndabere ìhè, ojii, ma ọ bụ agba agba. Bọtịnụ Copy signature (Gmail / Outlook) na-edetuo koodu dị njikere gaa clipboard. Ọzọkwa dị: Copy HTML code, Download as HTML, View HTML code, na bupụ ntọala dịka faịlụ JSON.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere ị ga-eji nwee mbinye aka email ọkachamara?
contentBlocks.html:
Mbinye aka email (nke a na-akpọkwa ala ozi email) bụ ngọngọ ozi n'ọgwụgwụ ozi ọ bụla ezitere. Ọ nwere nkọwa kpọtụrụ, aha ọrụ, aha ụlọ ọrụ, na na-abụkarị njikọ gaa weebụsaịtị ma ọ bụ kalenda nzukọ.

Onye nnata achọghị ịchọ nọmba ekwentị n'ime ozi gara aga — ozi niile dị njikere. Mbinye aka email ọkachamara na-egosikwa na ị na-elekọta nkọwa obere, ma na-edobe onyonyo ụlọ ọrụ kwekọrọ na nkwurịta ọnụ azụmaahịa.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi eji onye emepụta mbinye aka email
contentBlocks.description: Ịmepụta mbinye aka email ọkachamara na-ewe naanị nkeji ole na ole:

items.title: 1. Tinye nkọwa
items.description: Kpuchie aha gị, aha ọrụ, ụlọ ọrụ, na nkọwa kpọtụrụ.

items.title: 2. Dozie ọdịdị
items.description: Họrọ nhazi, agba, tinye logo, na njikọ mmekọrịta.

items.title: 3. Detuo koodu ahụ
items.description: Bọtịnụ Copy signature na-edetuo koodu dị njikere gaa clipboard. Mado ya naanị na Gmail, Outlook, ma ọ bụ onye ahịa email ọzọ.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi akpuchie nkọwa mbinye aka
contentBlocks.html:
Taabu Details nwere ubi niile ị nwere ike ikpuchie. Naanị abụọ achọrọ: aha na adreesị email. Ubi ndị fọdụrụ bụ nhọrọ, ha ga-apụta na mbinye aka naanị mgbe a kpuchiere ha.

Ubi ndị dị na taabu Details

  • Ahịrị n'elu aha — ederede ọzọ pụtara n'elu aha. Ị nwere ike itinye aha ụlọ ọrụ, okwu nkọwa, ma ọ bụ okwu mgbasa ozi.
  • Avatar / logo (URL onyonyo) — URL gaa onyonyo profaịlụ ma ọ bụ logo ụlọ ọrụ. Onyonyo kwesịrị ịbụ onígun nhata (ọ dịkarịa ala 120×120 px) ma dị na ọha na weebụ. Mgbe imadochara URL, nhọrọ ọzọ ga-apụta: Ụdị avatar (okirikiri, ntụpọ, ma ọ bụ onígun) na Nha avatar (obere — 40 px, etiti — 56 px, ukwuu — 72 px).
  • Aha zuru ezu — ubi achọrọ. Tinye aha gị zuru ezu.
  • Akara aha — ederede mkpụmkpụ n'akụkụ aha, dịka ọmụmaatụ, pronouns ma ọ bụ aha mkpụmkpụ.
  • Aha ọrụ — ọnọdụ gị n'ụlọ ọrụ, dịka ọmụmaatụ, Onye isi ahịa, Onye ndụmọdụ mgbasa ozi.
  • Aha ụlọ ọrụ — aha nzukọ ị na-anọchite anya.
  • Ahịrị ọzọ — nkọwa mkpụmkpụ nke ihe ị na-eme ma ọ bụ ihe ị na-enye.
  • Email — ubi achọrọ. Tinye adreesị email ọrụ gị.
  • Ekwentị — nọmba kpọtụrụ. Usoro ọ bụla, dịka ọmụmaatụ, +234 80 1234 5678.
  • Weebụsaịtị — URL zuru ezu nke weebụsaịtị gị ma ọ bụ nke ụlọ ọrụ.
  • Adreesị — adreesị nke ụlọ ọrụ ma ọ bụ ọfịs (nhọrọ).
  • Ozi gọọmentị — nọmba tax, nọmba ndebanye aha, ma ọ bụ ozi ofishal ndị ọzọ.

contentBlocks.title: Nhazi mbinye aka — nke ole ka ị ga-ahọrọ?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Nhazi mbinye aka

ỌkọlọtọỌkọlọtọ n'eluAhịrị n'eluAha n'aka ekpeN'etiti

Chukwuemeka Okafor

Onye nrụpụta weebụsaịtị

Arteon Agency

chukwuemeka@example.com

+234 80 1234 5678
contentBlocks.html:
Onye emepụta ahụ na-enye nhazi asatọ emechara. Ọ bụla na-egosi otu ozi n'ụzọ dị iche.

  • Standard — nhazi ogologo ntọala, ọ dabara na ọtụtụ ojiji.
  • Top bar — ahịrị kwụ ọtọ na-ekewa mbinye aka na ọdịnaya.
  • Labels left — kọlụm abụọ: akara na uru.
  • Centered — ụdị ọkọlọtọ, ọdịnaya n'etiti.
  • Compact — ihe niile n'otu ahịrị, ogologo kachasị nta.
  • Two columns — nkọwa n'aka ekpe, nkọwa kpọtụrụ n'aka nri.
  • Minimalist — naanị ozi kacha dị mkpa.
  • Bottom bar — ahịrị agba nwere nkọwa kpọtụrụ n'okpuru mbinye aka.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi etinye bọtịnụ CTA
contentBlocks.html:
Bọtịnụ CTA (oku ịme ihe) bụ akụkụ a pụrụ ịpị nke na-eduzi onye nnata gaa peeji ahọrọrọ. Ọ nwere ike ịbụ njikọ gaa kalenda nzukọ, fọọmụ kpọtụrụ, ma ọ bụ onyinye. Onye emepụta ahụ na-enye gị ohere itinye bọtịnụ CTA abụọ.

Bọtịnụ mbụ

  1. Mepee taabu Bọtịnụ na edita.
  2. Na ngalaba Bọtịnụ mbụ, tinye ederede onye nnata ga-ahụ, dịka ọmụmaatụ, Hazie nzukọ n'efu.
  3. N'ubi Njikọ CTA, mado URL zuru ezu. Adreesị kwesịrị ibido na https://.

Bọtịnụ nke abụọ

Ị nwere ike itinye bọtịnụ CTA nke abụọ n'ụdị outline (ndabere a na-ahụ site na ya nwere ókè). Kpuchie ubi na ngalaba Bọtịnụ nke abụọ otu ihe ahụ dịka bọtịnụ mbụ.

Ntụpọ bọtịnụ

N'okpuru taabu Bọtịnụ ị ga-ahụ nhọrọ Ntụpọ bọtịnụ. Nhọrọ atọ dị: Enweghị (akụkụ dị nkọ), Ntakịrị (ntụpọ ntakịrị), ma ọ bụ Zuru ezu (bọtịnụ okirikiri zuru ezu).

Ọ bụrụ na ị hapụrụ ubi abụọ na-ekpuchighị, bọtịnụ agaghị apụta na mbinye aka. Ọ bụrụ na ị kpuchiri naanị otu ubi, bọtịnụ agaghị apụta — achọrọ ederede na njikọ ha abụọ.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi etinye njikọ mmekọrịta
contentBlocks.html:
Na taabu Mmekọrịta ị nwere ike itinye njikọ gaa profaịlụ gị. Onye emepụta ahụ na-akwado ikpo okwu iri na abụọ: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X (nke bụbu Twitter), GitHub, Dribbble, Behance, WhatsApp, Telegram, na Pinterest.

Otu esi eme ya

  1. Mepee taabu Mmekọrịta na edita.
  2. N'akụkụ ikpo okwu ọ bụla ị ga-ahụ ubi URL. Mado njikọ zuru ezu gaa profaịlụ gị, dịka ọmụmaatụ, https://www.linkedin.com/in/profailigi.
  3. Kpuchie naanị ubi ị chọrọ. Ubi efu agaghị apụta na mbinye aka.

Akara mmekọrịta

N'okpuru taabu Mmekọrịta ị ga-ahụ nhọrọ Gosi akara n'akụkụ aha ọrụ. Mgbe emenyere ya, njikọ ga-apụta dịka akara SVG agba kama naanị aha.

  • Nha akara — nhọrọ: Obere (16 px), Etiti (20 px), ma ọ bụ Ukwuu (24 px).
  • Agba akara — Agba ikpo okwu (agba ntọala maka ikpo okwu ọ bụla), Agba mmetụta (otu agba mmetụta), ma ọ bụ Agba ederede.

contentBlocks.title: Ịdozi ọdịdị
contentBlocks.html:
Na taabu Ọdịdị ị nwere ike ịdozi agba, font, na akụkụ ọdịdị ndị ọzọ nke mbinye aka.

Isiokwu agba

N'elu taabu ahụ ị ga-ahụ isiokwu ise emechara: Ojii, Anụnụ, Ododo agụ, Akwụkwọ ndụ, na Ntụ. Ịpị isiokwu na-atọ agba mmetụta na agba ederede na-akpaghị aka. Nke a bụ ụzọ kachasị ngwa iji nweta ọdịdị mbinye aka kwekọrọ.

Agba

  • Agba mmetụta — a na-eji ya n'ahịrị akụkụ/elu, bọtịnụ CTA, na njikọ. Ị nwere ike ịhọrọ agba ọ bụla site na paleti.
  • Agba ederede — agba ederede niile na mbinye aka (aha, nkọwa kpọtụrụ, ozi iwu).
  • Agba ndabere — agba ndabere nke mbinye aka niile. Ọcha na ntọala, ma ị nwere ike ịgbanwe ya.

Font na nha

  • Font — nhọrọ: Arial, Verdana, Tahoma, Trebuchet MS, na Georgia. Ha niile dị nchekwa maka email, ha ga-apụtakwa nke ọma maka onye nnata.
  • Nha ederede — nhọrọ atọ: Obere (12 px), Ọkọlọtọ (14 px), na Ukwuu karịa (16 px).

contentBlocks.title: Ichekwa na-akpaghị aka na ịtọgharia
contentBlocks.html:
Onye emepụta ahụ na-echekwa ndozi niile na-akpaghị aka n'ebe nchekwa ihe nchọgharị (localStorage). Mgbe ịmegharịchara peeji ma ọ bụ megheechara ngwa ọrụ ahụ, data, nhazi, agba, na nhọrọ ndị ọzọ niile ga-alaghachi.

Otu ichekwa na-akpaghị aka si arụ ọrụ

A na-echekwa mgbanwe ọ bụla (ederede, agba, nhazi, oghere) ozugbo n'ebe nchekwa ihe nchọgharị. Ichekwa na-eme na-akpaghị aka na nzuzo — na-enweghị ịpị bọtịnụ ọ bụla.

Otu esi atọgharia

N'okpuru nlele mbinye aka ị ga-ahụ bọtịnụ Tọgharia ọdịdị. Mgbe ịpịchara, okwu ọhọrọ nkwenye ga-apụta. Ikwenye ịtọgharia ga-eweghachi data na ntọala niile gaa nke mbụ. Omume a enweghị ike ịlaghachi azụ.

Bupụ wee webata ntọala

N'okpuru nlele mbinye aka ị ga-ahụ bọtịnụ abụọ ọzọ: Bupụ ntọala na Webata ntọala. Bupụ na-echekwa data niile, agba, nhazi, oghere, na ụdị ederede gaa faịlụ JSON. Webata na-anabata ntọala echekwara site na faịlụ.

Nke a bara uru karịsịa mgbe ị chọrọ ibugharia ntọala mbinye aka n'etiti kọmputa, kesara ndozi na ndị ọrụ ibe, ma ọ bụ debe ndekọ ntọala gị tupu ndozi.

contentBlocks.title: Otu esi edetuo mbinye aka gaa Gmail ma ọ bụ Outlook
contentBlocks.description: Mgbe mbinye aka dị njikere, naanị nzọụkwụ ole na ole achọrọ iji tinye ya n'onye ahịa email gị:

items.title: 1. Detuo koodu ahụ
items.description: Bọtịnụ Copy signature (Gmail / Outlook) na-edetuo mbinye aka gaa clipboard dịka HTML ahaziri, dị njikere imado.

items.title: 2. Mepee ntọala mbinye aka
items.description: Na Gmail: Settings → See all settings → Signature. Na Outlook: File → Options → Mail → Signatures.

items.title: 3. Mado wee chekwaa
items.description: N'ubi mbinye aka, jiri Ctrl+V (Windows) ma ọ bụ Cmd+V (Mac). Mbinye aka ga-apụta nwere agba na nhazi niile. Chekwaa mgbanwe.

contentBlocks.title: Onye bụ onye emepụta mbinye aka email maka ya?
contentBlocks.description: Ngwa ọrụ mbinye aka email bara uru maka onye ọ bụla na-eziga email azụmaahịa:

items.title: Ndị ọrụ azụmaahịa na ndị na-arụ ọrụ onwe ha
items.description: Mbinye aka ọkachamara n'ozi ọ bụla na-enweghị ịgba onye nhazi.

items.title: Ndị otu ụlọ ọrụ
items.description: Onye ọrụ ọ bụla na-emepụta mbinye aka nke ya n'otu ụdị. Ịmata nke kwekọrọ n'ofe ụlọ ọrụ niile.

items.title: Ndị nnọchite anya ahịa
items.description: Bọtịnụ CTA nwere njikọ gaa kalenda ma ọ bụ onyinye na-abawanye ohere ịhazi nzukọ.

items.title: Ndị ọka iwu, ndị akaụntụ, ndị dọkịta
items.description: Ike itinye ozi iwu, nọmba ikike, nọmba tax, ma ọ bụ ozi ofishal ndị ọzọ nke ụlọ ọrụ chọrọ.

contentBlocks.title: Gịnị mere onye emepụta mbinye aka email HTML a ji dị iche?

items.title: Nhazi mbinye aka asatọ
items.description: Standard, top bar, labels left, centered, compact, two columns, minimalist, na bottom bar.

items.title: Ichekwa na-akpaghị aka n'ime ihe nchọgharị
items.description: A na-echekwa mgbanwe ọ bụla na-akpaghị aka n'ebe nchekwa ihe nchọgharị. Mgbe ịmegharịchara peeji, mbinye aka ka nọ.

items.title: Bupụ wee webata ntọala
items.description: Ị nwere ike ibupụ ntọala mbinye aka zuru ezu dịka faịlụ JSON wee kesara ndị ọrụ ibe.

items.title: Ikpo okwu mmekọrịta 12
items.description: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X, GitHub, Dribbble, Behance, WhatsApp, Telegram, na Pinterest.

items.title: Ịdozi omimi
items.description: Ụdị na nha avatar, ụdị ahịrị, agba na nha ederede akụkụ ọ bụla.

items.title: Nhọrọ ibupụ ọtụtụ
items.description: Detuo HTML, budata faịlụ, nlele koodu isi mmalite, bupụ/webata ntọala JSON.

items.title: Nzuzo
items.description: A naghị eziga data gaa sava. Onye emepụta ahụ na-arụ ọrụ kpamkpam n'ime ihe nchọgharị.

items.title: Ndakọrịta
items.description: Koodu HTML emepụtara na-arụ ọrụ na Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, na Thunderbird.

items.title: Nlele na-adị ndụ
items.description: Mgbanwe ọ bụla na-apụta ozugbo na ndabere ìhè, ojii, ma ọ bụ agba agba.

contentBlocks.title: Ajụjụ a na-ajụkarị gbasara onye emepụta mbinye aka email

items.question: Mbinye aka ahụ ọ na-arụ ọrụ na Gmail, Outlook, na Apple Mail?
items.answer: Ee. Mbinye aka nke onye emepụta mepụtara na-eji tebụl HTML nke na-apụta nke ọma na ndị ahịa email a ma ama niile: Gmail, Outlook (desktọọpụ na weebụ), Apple Mail, Thunderbird. Nhazi ahụ dabara na ngwaọrụ dị iche iche, gụnyere ekwentị mkpanaaka.

items.question: Enwere m ike itinye logo ụlọ ọrụ?
items.answer: Ee. Na taabu Details, mado URL onyonyo (logo ma ọ bụ onyonyo profaịlụ). Onyonyo kwesịrị ịbụ onígun nhata (ọ dịkarịa ala 120×120 px) ma dị na ọha na weebụ. Mgbe imadochara URL, nhọrọ maka ụdị (okirikiri, ntụpọ, onígun) na nha (40, 56, ma ọ bụ 72 px) ga-apụta.

items.question: Kedu ka m ga-esi detuo mbinye aka gaa onye ahịa email?
items.answer: Bọtịnụ Copy signature (Gmail / Outlook) n'okpuru nlele na-edetuo mbinye aka gaa clipboard dịka HTML ahaziri. Na edita mbinye aka Gmail ma ọ bụ Outlook, jiri Ctrl+V (Windows) ma ọ bụ Cmd+V (Mac) naanị.

items.question: Enwere m ike iji onye emepụta ahụ mepụta mbinye aka maka ndị otu niile?
items.answer: Ee. Onye emepụta ahụ achọghị nbanye ma ọ bụ ndebanye aha. Onye ọ bụla n'otu nwere ike ịmeghe ngwa ọrụ, kpuchie nkọwa ha, wee detuo mbinye aka dị njikere. Iji debe ọdịdị kwekọrọ, kwekọrịta na ntọala a kesara: otu nhazi, isiokwu agba, na font. Ị nwekwara ike ibupụ ntọala dịka faịlụ JSON wee kesara ndị ọrụ ibe — ha chọrọ naanị iwebata faịlụ wee gbanwee nkọwa nke onwe ha.

items.question: Enwere m ike itinye akara mmekọrịta nke m?
items.answer: Onye emepụta ahụ na-enye akara SVG arụnyere maka ikpo okwu iri na abụọ: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, X, GitHub, Dribbble, Behance, WhatsApp, Telegram, na Pinterest. Mee ka nhọrọ Gosi akara rụọ ọrụ na taabu Mmekọrịta. Ị nwere ike ịhọrọ nha akara na agba (agba ikpo okwu, agba mmetụta, ma ọ bụ agba ederede).

items.question: Bọtịnụ idetuo anaghị arụ ọrụ — gịnị mere?
items.answer: Iji detuo mbinye aka, kpuchie ọ dịkarịa ala ubi abụọ: aha na adreesị email. Lelee na akpuchielara ubi ha abụọ.

items.question: Avatar ma ọ bụ logo apụtaghị — gịnị ka m ga-eme?
items.answer: Onyonyo kwesịrị ịdị na ọha na weebụ. URL kwesịrị itụ aka ozugbo na faịlụ onyonyo (nke na-ejedebe na .jpg, .png, ma ọ bụ .webp). Onyonyo site na Google Drive ma ọ bụ Dropbox chọrọ njikọ ikesa pụrụ iche.

items.question: Mbinye aka na-apụta iche maka onye nnata — gịnị mere?
items.answer: Ndị ahịa email dị iche iche (Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail) nwere ike ịdị iche ntakịrị n'otu ha si egosi HTML. Onye emepụta ahụ na-eji ụdị dị nchekwa nke na-arụ ọrụ na ọtụtụ usoro. Ọ bụrụ na ị hụrụ ọdịiche ukwuu, jide n'aka na ị na-amado mbinye aka site na Ctrl+V, ọ bụghị Mado dịka ederede lasan.

items.question: Bọtịnụ CTA apụtaghị — gịnị ka m ga-eme?
items.answer: Bọtịnụ chọrọ ubi abụọ: ederede na njikọ. Lelee na na taabu Bọtịnụ, akpuchielara ubi ha abụọ na URL bidoro na https://.

items.question: Kedu ka m ga-esi bupụ ma ọ bụ webata ntọala mbinye aka?
items.answer: N'okpuru nlele mbinye aka ị ga-ahụ bọtịnụ Bupụ ntọala na Webata ntọala. Bupụ na-echekwa ntọala zuru ezu (data, agba, nhazi, oghere, ụdị ederede) gaa faịlụ JSON. Webata na-anabata ntọala site na faịlụ, na-etinye ndozi niile na-akpaghị aka.
